reviews.comment:
Estación del ACA muy confiable y buena atención lo único que con tarjeta naranja aceptan solo 1 pago y no 3 como otras YPF

(Translated by Google)
The ACA station is very reliable and has good service; the only issue is that they only accept one payment with the Orange Card, not three like other YPF stations.
